mapper.select: SELECT CURRICULUM_ID, TITLE, INSTRUCTOR_ID, USE_YN, STRT_DT, END_DT, EXPLN_CN, RGTR_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MDFR_ID, MDFCN_DT FROM CURRICULUM WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY REG_DT DESC

SELECT C.CURRICULUM_ID, C.TITLE, C.INSTRUCTOR_ID, C.USE_YN, C.STRT_DT, C.END_DT, C.EXPLN_CN, C.RGTR_ID, C.REG_DT, C.LAST_MDFR_ID, C.MDFCN_DT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COURSE WHERE CURRICULUM_ID = C.CURRICULUM_ID) AS COURSE_COUNT FROM CURRICULUM C WHERE C.INSTRUCTOR_ID = #{instructorId} AND C.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY C.REG_DT DESC
SELECT CURRICULUM_ID, TITLE, INSTRUCTOR_ID, USE_YN, STRT_DT, END_DT, EXPLN_CN, RGTR_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MDFR_ID, MDFCN_DT FROM CURRICULUM WHERE CURRICULUM_ID = #{curriculumId} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_CURRICULUM.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO CURRICULUM ( CURRICULUM_ID, TITLE, INSTRUCTOR_ID, USE_YN, STRT_DT, END_DT, EXPLN_CN, RGTR_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MDFR_ID, MDFCN_DT ) VALUES ( #{curriculumId}, #{title}, #{instructorId}, 'Y', #{strtDt, jdbcType=DATE}, #{endDt, jdbcType=DATE}, #{explnCn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rgtrId}, SYSDATE, #{lastMdfrId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE CURRICULUM SET TITLE = #{title}, STRT_DT = #{strtDt, jdbcType=DATE}, END_DT = #{endDt, jdbcType=DATE}, EXPLN_CN = #{explnCn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_MDFR_ID = #{lastMdfrId}, MDFCN_DT = SYSDATE WHERE CURRICULUM_ID = #{curriculumId}
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(MAX(SORT_ORD), 0) FROM COURSE WHERE CURRICULUM_ID = #{curriculumId}
mapper.update: UPDATE COURSE SET SORT_ORD = SORT_ORD - 1 WHERE CURRICULUM_ID = #{curriculumId} AND SORT_ORD > #{sortOrd}
mapper.select: SELECT SORT_ORD FROM COURSE WHERE COURSE_SN = #{courseSn} AND CURRICULUM_ID = #{curriculumId}
mapper.update: UPDATE COURSE SET SORT_ORD = #{sortOrd} WHERE COURSE_SN = #{courseSn} AND CURRICULUM_ID = #{curriculumId}
UPDATE COURSE SET SORT_ORD = SORT_ORD + 10000 WHERE CURRICULUM_ID = #{curriculumId}
mapper.select: SELECT COURSE_SN, COURSE_NM, OPNN_YN, SORT_ORD, TOT_LRN_TIME_CNT FROM COURSE WHERE CURRICULUM_ID = #{curriculumId} ORDER BY SORT_ORD ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COURSE WHERE COURSE_SN = #{courseSn} AND INSTR_USER_ID = #{instrUserId}
SELECT COURSE_SN, COURSE_NM, OPNN_YN FROM COURSE WHERE CURRICULUM_ID IS NULL AND INSTR_USER_ID = #{instrUserId} ORDER BY COURSE_NM ASC
